summary: Documentation pass on data-serialize-cleanup after auditor PASS. Updated 7 docs (io-channels, callbacks, architecture, good_to_know, app-tree, data-spec, variables) for the five-stage shift: ISerializer Data-input, merged application/plang (no more +data), Compress flattened, Properties wire scope with new ! operator, envelope vocab sweep, this.Envelope.cs → this.Transport.cs. Applied the one CLAUDE.md proposal (coder's 'Data is not enveloped' rule) to /CLAUDE.md (the proposed target /PLang/App/CLAUDE.md does not exist in this tree; project's canonical CLAUDE.md is the repo root). No PLang example gaps — tester wrote the Properties / ! operator and Compress round-trip coverage. PASS — ready to merge.

changes.description: WriteCore/ReadCore/AskCore → Write/Read/Ask abstract hooks; AskCore → AskAsync public orchestrator; WriteAsync signature uses Data instead of object?; contentType → type; envelope vocab removed (L135).

Dropped 'application/plang+data' section (merged into application/plang); replaced 'Lazy signing — ICallback-only carve-out' with 'Sign-if-missing — the converter does it'; PlangDataSerializer references removed; wire JSON example includes properties field; envelope vocab swept; pointers updated to WireJsonConverter and merged plang serializer.

Channel field is Mime (not ContentType); serializer list updated to application/json + text/plain + merged application/plang with WireJsonConverter+Transport.ForOutbound+Sensitive.Strip; registry uses GetByType; ICallback-only carve-out removed from callbacks section; directory tree shows this.Transport.cs + Properties.cs + WireJsonConverter.cs.

Replaced Data.Envelope Compress reference with Data.Transport Compress through the merged serializer; removed _envelopeJsonOptions reference; serializer impl list (Json, Text, plang) — dropped plang+data; GetByContentType → GetByType; signing-module envelope vocab swept (signed data envelope → cryptographic signature on Data); added sign-if-missing note.
'universal result envelope' → 'universal result wrapper'; Data partial-class tree shows this.Transport.cs, plus Properties.cs and WireJsonConverter.cs as siblings.

§15 'Envelope Pipeline' renamed to 'Transport Pipeline' (flat Compress shape, Properties round-trip, signature round-trip); new §15a 'Properties — sidecar metadata' (insertion gate, PLang access table for ./! operators, write surface, malformed shapes); §16 Signature expanded with sign-if-missing and canonicalization rules.

Properties section rewritten: new IDictionary<string,object?> shape, insertion gate, PLang access table for . vs !, write surface, malformed-shape gate, leading-! infrastructure namespace disambiguation.

Applied coder's CLAUDE.md proposal: new 'Data is not enveloped' rule added to the Runtime2 Conventions block, alongside the System.IO/Console.* bans. References WireJsonConverter and points to data-spec §15a/§16 and callbacks 'Sign-if-missing' for full background.
User-visible CHANGELOG for the five-stage branch (serializer pipeline, wire-format merge, wire shape, signing model, compress flatten, Properties+! operator, vocabulary sweep, migration notes).

findings.issue: Channel hook names WriteCore/ReadCore/AskCore and AskCore signature were stale after Stage 1.
findings.detail: Renamed throughout (5 hits); AskCore → AskAsync on the public orchestrator; abstract Ask takes modules.output.ask action (matches source).

findings.issue: Entire 'application/plang+data' section described a deleted serializer (PlangDataSerializer + +data mimetype + ICallback-only lazy signing).
findings.detail: Section replaced with 'The application/plang mimetype' explaining the merged serializer; new 'Sign-if-missing — the converter does it' section replaces the ICallback carve-out.

findings.issue: L507 paragraph claimed lazy signing fires only for ICallback values, citing PlangDataSerializer.
findings.detail: Rewritten to describe converter-driven sign-if-missing on every Data, with forwarding-preserves-provenance note.

findings.issue: References to Data.Envelope / _envelopeJsonOptions / GetByContentType / signed data envelope vocab.
findings.detail: Five edits; serializer impl list dropped plang+data.

findings.issue: No documentation for the new %x!key% Properties dereference operator (Stage 4).
findings.detail: Properties section rewritten with access table, write surface, and malformed-shape gate.

findings.issue: §15 'Envelope Pipeline' described the old inner-gzip-Data Compress shape and asserted Properties don't round-trip.
findings.detail: Renamed to 'Transport Pipeline'; updated to flat archived shape; Properties-round-trip note added; new §15a Properties section covers the wire scope, ! operator, insertion gate.

findings.issue: Data tree referenced this.Envelope.cs; 'result envelope' vocab.
findings.detail: Tree updated to this.Transport.cs + Properties.cs + WireJsonConverter.cs; vocab cleaned.

claude_md_proposals.reason: Genuinely canonical (deleted Envelope class is the load-bearing example; the rule applies to all future serialization work). Proposal target /PLang/App/CLAUDE.md does not exist in this tree — applied to /CLAUDE.md (the project's canonical CLAUDE.md). One wording fix in the applied form: 'app.data.Json' → 'app.data.WireJsonConverter' since the WireJsonConverter handles the wire shape, not Json.cs (the STJ wrapper).
